prompt: Tap button seat before profile-based exploit action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before player-based exploit decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Button is the seat anchor because the in-position seat owns the clearest read on how far this exploit should go.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Tap the button because that seat anchors the in-position profile read before the exploit decision.
